[Part 03 / 05] Projects

Selected projects with product thinking behind the pixels.

A focused set of work that shows interface craft, data-aware thinking, validation, responsive design, and a practical full-stack learning path.

Featured
Knowledge sharing2026

Expert Advice Platform

A guided advice experience that helps students discover practical recommendations, compare options, and move from uncertainty to action.

Designed for quick scanning, clear calls to action, and approachable expert content.

Student planning2025

Pathfinder

A career and study planning interface for mapping goals, recommended paths, resources, and progress checkpoints.

Turns broad learning goals into structured, navigable steps.

Secure workflows2025

Digital Voting System

A voting workflow prototype focused on eligibility, clear ballot states, result visibility, and a dependable administrative experience.

Explores trustworthy civic interfaces with strong validation and transparent states.

Personal brand2026

Portfolio Design System

A handcrafted portfolio system with theme persistence, reusable cards, responsive layouts, motion primitives, and typed content.

A production-minded personal site built to be extended as experience grows.
